title: ERP System — BOM Module
desc: In-house ERP replacing fragmented per-department Excel sheets.
longDesc: In-house ERP replacing fragmented per-department Excel sheets. The Bill-of-Materials module unifies product structure, raw materials, and inventory cost into one role-based, always up-to-date source of truth.

title: Massage Administration System
desc: Web app for managing Thai massage parlor operations with role-based access for Admin and Secretary.
longDesc: Web app for managing Thai massage parlor operations with role-based access for Admin and Secretary. Features appointment scheduling, staff profiles, service management, and monthly revenue reports.

title: Nexus
desc: Personal crypto trading bot with full-auto and hybrid execution modes for Binance.
longDesc: Personal crypto trading bot web interface with full-auto and hybrid execution modes for Binance. Features real-time WebSocket updates, AI-powered news analysis, and a REST API for Suwisa.

title: Suwisa
desc: Personal assistant on Discord with conversation memory, Gmail access, and web search.
longDesc: Personal assistant on Discord with conversation memory, Gmail access, and web search. Integrates with Nexus to deliver real-time alerts and portfolio queries, powered by Anthropic Claude.

title: Crossword Solver
desc: Algorithm that solves a crossword game with 8 interconnected paths using backtracking.
longDesc: Algorithm that calculates the answer to a crossword game with 8 interconnected paths and moves down the grid as letters are used. Uses backtracking to find the correct path.

title: NFC Deck Tracker
desc: Mobile app for managing and tracking TCG decks in real time with NFC.
longDesc: Mobile app for managing and tracking TCG decks in real time with NFC. Built with Flutter under the concept of Clean Architecture as a Bachelor's Thesis at Silpakorn University.

title: Astral Oracle
desc: Web app for tarot card readings with personalized predictions powered by Groq AI.
longDesc: Web app for tarot card readings with personalized predictions powered by Groq AI. It features an interactive interface for drawing and interpreting tarot cards.
